title: Ucriana insignis
taxonomy: Ucriana insignis is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is a type of succulent plant endemic to Italy. The classification of Ucriana insignis is within the genus Ucriana, which is a monotypic genus. Ucriana insignis is closely related to the genus Echiteae. Ucriana insignis is further classified into the order Gentianales, due to its similarities in characteristics with other plants in this order.
